basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Project Associate and Project Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) Senior Project Associate, Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iiserpune.ac.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the IISER Pune Senior Project Associate, Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max 40 years for Senior Project Associate, Max 32 years for Project Assistant
age_limit.details: Senior Project Associate: Maximum age limit is 40 years. Project Assistant: Maximum age limit is 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Physics/Chemistry/Materials Science or related areas; M.Sc. in Physics/Chemistry/Materials Science or B.E./B.Tech. in Materials Science/Chemical Engineering
qualification.details: Senior Project Associate: Ph.D. in Physics / Chemistry / Materials Science or related areas. Hands-on experience in the area of battery materials or similar energy materials, use of analytical techniques and data analysis and device testing will be preferred. Project Assistant: M.Sc. in Physics / Chemistry / Materials Science. OR B.E./B.Tech. in Materials Science / Chemical Engineering. Candidates who have done project work on energy materials and/or have post M.Sc. related hands-on experience will be preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 57,000 + 30% House Rent Allowance / Rs. 27,000/- + 30% House Rent Allowance
salary_details.details: Senior Project Associate: Rs. 57,000 + 30% House Rent Allowance per month Project Assistant: Rs. 27,000/- + 30% House Rent Allowance per month

selection_process: Shortlisting based on applications Online Interview via Zoom
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IISER Pune Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IISER Pune Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IISER Pune Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.indian_institute_of_science_education_an: Rs. 57,000 + 30% House Rent Allowance / Rs. 27,000/- + 30% House Rent Allowance

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IISER Pune Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IISER Pune Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Senior Project Associate: Ph.D. in Physics / Chemistry / Materials Science or related areas. Hands-on experience in the area of battery materials or similar energy materials, use of analytical techniques and data analysis and device testing will be preferred. Project Assistant: M.Sc. in Physics / Chemistry / Materials Science. OR B.E./B.Tech. in Materials Science / Chemical Engineering. Candidates who have done project work on energy materials and/or have post M.Sc. related hands-on experience will be preferred.

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Senior Project Associate: Maximum age limit is 40 years. Project Assistant: Maximum age limit is 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Senior Project Associate: Rs. 57,000 + 30% House Rent Allowance per month Project Assistant: Rs. 27,000/- + 30% House Rent Allowance per month

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on applications Online Interview via Zoom

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IISER Pune Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IISER Pune recruitment is 15th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IISER Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced by IISER Pune for the recruitment drive. These positions are for Senior Project Associate and Project Assistant roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Project Assistant position, candidates need to have an M.Sc. in Physics, Chemistry, or Materials Science, or a B.E./B.Tech. in Materials Science or Chemical Engineering.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Project Associate post will receive a salary of Rs. 57,000 plus 30% House Rent Allowance per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Assistant position is 32 years.

faq.question: Q6. How will the candidates be selected for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications based on the eligibility criteria and qualifications. Shortlisted candidates will then be invited for an online interview conducted via Zoom.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates applying for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their applications to the specified email address on or before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the advertised positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Senior Project Associate and Project Assistant at IISER Pune are on a temporary and contractual basis, intended for funded projects.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link. It is also available on the official website of IISER Pune.
